title: subworkflow - dynatrace list and filter execution history
description:
Subworkflow to retrieve and filter workflow execution history

This subworkflow queries past workflow executions with filtering by status, time range, and trigger type.

Parameters:

workflowId: (Optional) Filter by specific workflow ID
status: (Optional) Execution status filter (SUCCESS, FAILED, RUNNING, TIMEOUT)
timeFrameMinutes: (Optional) Look-back time in minutes - default 1440
maxResults: (Optional) Maximum results to return - default 50
sortBy: (Optional) Sort field (startTime, endTime, duration)

Returns execution records with status and duration
guide:
## 📊 **Subworkflow to List and Filter Execution History**

📈 This subworkflow **retrieves and filters workflow execution history** by status, time range, and trigger type.

Enables monitoring, compliance auditing, and performance analysis of automation runs.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **workflowId** (Optional): 🆔 Filter by specific workflow
- **status** (Optional): 📊 Execution status  
  *(Options: `SUCCESS`, `FAILED`, `RUNNING`, `TIMEOUT`)*
- **timeFrameMinutes** (Optional): 🕐 Look-back time  
  *(Default: `1440` = 24 hours)*
- **maxResults** (Optional): 📋 Max results  
  *(Default: `50`)*
- **sortBy** (Optional): 📈 Sort field  
  *(Options: `startTime`, `endTime`, `duration`)*

---

### 📊 **Execution Metrics**

- Success rate
- Average duration
- Failure patterns
- Resource utilization

---

### 🧠 **Usage Context**

- ✅ Performance monitoring
- ✅ Troubleshooting
- ✅ Compliance auditing
- ✅ SLA tracking

---

list-executions.name: list-executions
list-executions.description: List and filter workflow execution history
